introduction: Complex mechanical devices of dwarven design, covered in centuries of dust and corrosion.

You recognize some of the components - gears, levers, pressure plates - all part of an elaborate locking system. These mechanisms once controlled something important, perhaps the dungeon entrance below.
Most of the machinery is broken or seized with rust. However, you notice fresh tool marks on some pieces. Someone has been trying to repair them, to bypass the locks.
A few silver gears lie scattered on the floor, recently pried loose. You pocket them - they might be valuable to a collector or engineer.
